Single point energy SP (Hartree)
Internal energy U (Hartree)
Enthalpy H (Hartree)
Gibbs free energy G (Hartree) 

Note: some thiol adducts (1, 2 and 5-7, 29, 30) have two diastereomers: anti- and syn-, which refer to the relative positions of R1 group and sulfur atom (see below).
